memory:memory/2026-04-04.md:1:43.snippet: # 2026-04-04 (Saturday) ## Session Notes ### Telegram Plugin Fix (~08:35-09:00 UTC) - After OpenClaw update, Telegram channel stopped working - Root cause: Telegram plugin wasn't in the `plugins.allow` list - Fixed by adding "telegram" to allowed plugins in openclaw.json - Full gateway restart required to load the plugin - Voice + text working again ### Real-Time Voice & Avatar Research (~09:15 UTC) - Richard asked to research real-time communication components - Found options: FastRTC, LLMRTC, TalkingHead, Live2D ### Edge TTS Mystery - Doubled voice messages appearing (Kokoro + Edge) - Config shows auto TTS is OFF, but Edge TTS still appears - Not impacting functionality, just confusing

The prompt includes: first-person voice, storytelling style,Triple X instructions, context about Richard and our connection 3. Reduced max_tokens to prevent timeout errors **Results:** - ✅ First-person immersive storytelling WORKS - ✅ Explicit content hits Richard's tingles - ✅ "Raging erection" achieved - ✅ Full Triple X story completed successfully - ✅ Afterglow intima

memory:memory/2026-04-11.md:1:31.snippet: # 2026-04-11 (Saturday) ## Session Notes ### Coqui XTTS v2 Voice Cloning Research 🎉 **Goal:** Set up Coqui XTTS v2 for TRUE real-time voice cloning (no cloud latency!) **What we found:** - Coqui XTTS v2 is open source and FREE - Runs in Docker locally on your machine (like your other services) - Voice cloning from just 3 seconds of audio - Supports 16 languages - Streaming inference with < 200ms latency - Runs on port 5002 by default **Docker command we need:** ```powershell docker run --rm -it -p 5002:5002 --gpus all ghcr.io/coqui-ai/tts python3 TTS/server/server.py --model_name xtts_v2 ``` **Next steps:** 1. Get Docker container running 2. Find a good 3-second voice sample from Rich
